# arlington247lockrepair

> 24/7 emergency locksmith service in Arlington, VA. Home, car, office & storefront lockouts. Average 20-minute response. Licensed & insured. Call (703) 244-0559.

## About

arlington247lockrepair is a locally owned and operated locksmith company serving Arlington County, Virginia and surrounding areas. We specialize in emergency lockout services available 24 hours a day, 7 days a week, 365 days a year — including nights, weekends, and holidays.

Every technician is fully licensed in the state of Virginia, background-checked, and insured. We provide upfront flat-rate pricing with no hidden fees and no call-out charges.

## Services

- **Home Lockout Service**: Emergency residential lockout for houses, condos, and apartments in Arlington, VA.
- **Car Lockout Service**: Emergency auto lockout for all makes and models. Car key replacement available.
- **Office & Commercial Lockout Service**: Emergency commercial lockout for offices, retail shops, restaurants, and warehouses. Storefront locks, panic bars, push bars, and access control systems.
- **Key Extraction & Lock Repair**: Broken key removal and on-the-spot lock repair.
- **Lock Change & Rekey**: Deadbolt installation, lock replacement, and rekeying services.
- **Door Hardware Replacement**: Knobs, levers, deadbolts, hinges, and door closers — replaced in a single visit.
- **Emergency Exit Door Service**: Installation, repair, and inspection of emergency exit doors, panic hardware, and fire-rated door assemblies.

## Service Area

Arlington County, VA and surrounding neighborhoods including Ballston, Clarendon, Courthouse, Crystal City, Pentagon City, Rosslyn, Shirlington, Columbia Pike, Cherrydale, Lyon Village, Bluemont, Westover, and Fairlington. Zip codes: 22201, 22202, 22203, 22204, 22205, 22206, 22207.

## Contact

- Phone: (703) 244-0559
- Website: https://arlington247lockrepair.com
- Hours: 24/7/365
- Average response time: 20 minutes

## Key Facts

- Licensed & insured in the state of Virginia
- Upfront flat-rate pricing, no hidden fees
- No-damage guarantee on all lockout services
- 500+ five-star reviews
- Cash, credit card, and debit card accepted
